name: Under Par Golf Studio
about: Under Par Golf Studio is a premier indoor golf facility in Lincoln, NE, offering golf lessons, custom club fitting, practice facilities, and club repair services. The studio utilizes the latest golf technologies, including Foresight Sports and GSPro software, to provide an authentic on-course experience indoors. Services include simulator rentals for playing world-class courses, professional instruction with launch monitor technology, and expert club fitting to optimize performance.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art GCQuad launch monitor for precise data analysis
Access to world-class golf courses via Foresight Sports and GSPro software
Professional club fitting with top brands like Titleist and Callaway
Year-round availability regardless of weather conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor with precise ball tracking

faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether clubs are provided. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned, so outside food and drink policies are unclear.

faq.answer: Playing 18 holes takes approximately 1 hour per person.

faq.answer: The venue mentions 'players of all levels' but doesn't specifically address child-friendly features or policies.
